ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MJoa', ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Detail__c , 'Replacement car') , ISBLANK(Expected_Return_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is mandatory and must be filled if the case detail is 'Replacement car'.
